summary: Frontend-only test of Super Admin 4-tab dashboard (Overview, Photographers, Payments, Broadcast Email). Login, tab switching, data rendering, and regression (root Sign In + /admin tenant login for mark) all verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: OverviewTab: d.trials_ending_soon is accessed without optional chaining — if backend ever omits the field this will throw. Consider (d.trials_ending_soon || []).

SMTP form: smtp_password field is bound to state — GET /super/email-settings likely returns the current password back to the client. Recommend backend redact the password on GET, and treat empty string on save as 'no change'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified via Playwright on preview URL. Super admin login (superadmin/Stu!d10App_2026xQ) works. Overview shows: Photographers=2, Subscribed=0, On trial=2, Galleries=2, MRR=£0, Total revenue=£0, Suspended=0, 'No trials ending soon.'. Photographers tab lists tenants, New Photographer btn opens dialog. Payments tab shows Collected £0, Transactions=1 (Weddings By Mark, pro, £35, initiated, 04 Jul 2026). Email tab: all 10 required data-testids present, recipient banner shows '2 photographer(s)', Save returned 'Email settings saved' toast, Send test returned expected 'SMTP error: No address associated with hostname' toast (expected in sandbox). New Photographer button correctly only visible on Photographers tab. Regression: '/' shows Sign In + go-to-signup-link; /admin login as mark/Test!2026 navigates to /admin/dashboard successfully.
test_credentials: superadmin / Stu!d10App_2026xQ ; tenant admin mark / Test!2026
